title: ProDec 100 sqm (2m x 50m) Polythene Dust Sheet Roll, Dustproof and Waterproof Ideal for Covering and Protecting Floors and Furniture from Spills and Splashes When Painting and Decorating
features: Lightweight yet effective dust sheet for protecting floors and furniture against paint drips, splashes, spills, dust and dirt
50 m long sheet supplied in a compact, fold-out roll that can be cut to size to minimise wastage
2 m (6'6 Inch) width ideal for floors, stairs and corridors
MORE INFORMATION BELOW in the 'From The Manufacturer' section - click on 'See More Product Details' or scroll down
description: From the manufacturer ProDec is the UK's most widely distributed brand of trade decorating accessories, so whether you're a seasoned pro, enthusiastic DIYer or even a beginner, we've got everything you need for a great finish - just add paint Polythene dust sheets - temporary protection at superb value Polythene dust sheets are a lighter and more cost-effective alternative to cotton dust sheets, but unlike cotton sheets they are waterproof, giving protection not just against dust and dirt but also against drips, splashes and spills of paint, wallpaper paste and other liquids. ProDec polythene dust sheets are made from LDPE material so, unlike cotton sheets, they can be recycled. This is a handy roll format so you're not stuck with a fixed sheet size and can cut it to the required size for the job at hand, which also minimises waste. The product is suitable for interior use only. More temporary protection solutions from ProDec ProDec has a range of products for protecting floors and furniture against paint drips, splashes, spills, dust, dirt and more during decorating and general maintenance work. Polythene dust sheets Made from dustproof and waterproof LDPE material and available in both sheets and rolls, polythene is lightweight and cost-effective. Super Cling Super Cling is dustproof and waterproof LDPE material that has been statically charged to enable it to cling to virtually any surface without the need for taping, including walls, windows, doors, upholstery, bookcases, furniture, cabinets and much more. Self-adhesive films Made from puncture resistant polythene that enables it to withstand heavy traffic, ProDec’s self-adhesive film protects against liquid spills such as paint, varnish, wallpaper paste, oil, grease, mud and more. It applies easily without the need for any special application tools and stays in place once down. Available in Carpet, Hard Floor and Glass grades. Cotton dust sheets Classic cotton twill fabric that soaks up small splashes of paint, wallpaper paste and other liquids, as well as minimising the transfer of dust and debris. Available in a range of sizes in both standard and Protector waterproof plastic backed versions.
